sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement documentation found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: dodge
special_mechanics.description: Player can dodge to left or right to avoid opponent attacks, cannot punch while dodging

special_mechanics.name: duck
special_mechanics.description: Player can duck to avoid attacks, cannot punch while ducking, cannot duck body blows

special_mechanics.name: block
special_mechanics.description: Player can block attacks to head or body, but cannot block strong punches which must be avoided

special_mechanics.name: counter-punch
special_mechanics.description: Player can launch counter-punches immediately after avoiding an opponent's attack

special_mechanics.name: knockout_punch
special_mechanics.description: Special high-damage punches (uppercuts, hooks, rapid punches) executable when power meter is full, have slight execution delay

special_mechanics.name: power_meter
special_mechanics.description: Meter fills as player lands punches, depletes when hit, enables knockout punches when full

special_mechanics.name: power_up_status
special_mechanics.description: Achieved when background color behind player face reaches red, increases punch speed and power, lost on knockdown

special_mechanics.name: stamina_recovery
special_mechanics.description: Player can recover stamina while opponent is down by pressing controller buttons

tier_notes: Tier 1 - This is a boxing game with emphasis on combat mechanics rather than movement physics. No empirical movement, jump, or gravity data documented in available sources. Game focuses on punch timing, dodging patterns, and opponent tells rather than character physics. Available documentation covers gameplay mechanics, anti-piracy systems, and debug functions but contains no physics parameters.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Punch-Out!! (SNES)
